title: 🏪 Stores
lead: Services initiated directly in stores follow a collaborative flow with SAC.

step1.title: Store Registration
step1.text: The store registers the service in the system (Salesforce) whenever it identifies a request that requires follow-up, investigation, or forwarding to another area.

step2.title: Routing to SAC
step2.text: Most of these requests are routed to SAC, which takes over the case analysis.

step3.title: Final Response
step3.text: SAC is responsible for ensuring that the response is clear, complete, and within the agreed timeframe, always recording progress in the system.

sac.title: SAC takes over:
sac.item2: Contact with internal areas (financial, operations, parking, cards)

highlight.title: Benefit
highlight.text: This process avoids rework and ensures that the customer has a unique and centralized experience.

q1.text: True or False: SAC is responsible for the final response to customers in services initiated at stores.
q1.feedback: Correct! SAC ensures that the response is clear, complete, and within the agreed timeframe.
